mapper.sql: select id, tenant_id, io_no, io_type, biz_date, equipment_id, remark, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from equipment_accessory_io
mapper.select: where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
mapper.insert: insert into equipment_accessory_io (id, tenant_id, io_no, io_type, biz_date, equipment_id, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{ioNo}, #{ioType}, #{bizDate}, #{equipmentId}, #{remark}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
